releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.2.3

修复
- 暗黑模式下多处样式异常（更新说明、反馈区域等）
- MySQL、OceanBase 模版库跳转工作台无法正确回显目标对象
- 多工作台 Tab 重启后页面空白
- 未激活用户数据源数量限制从 3 个调整为 1 个
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.2.3

Fixes
- Dark mode style issues across multiple areas (update notes, feedback section, etc.)
- MySQL/OceanBase template navigation failing to restore target object
- Workspace tabs showing blank after app restart
- Unactivated user datasource limit changed from 3 to 1
